game.short_text: A Katamari like experience! Collect nuts/random scenery and grow into a ball of chaos!
game.title: Let There Be Nuts!

details.title: Let There Be Nuts!
details.description:
Let There Be Nuts! is a project I submitted for the Brackeys Game Jam 2021.2. I was ecstatic when I found out that I won #1 in Game Design for a jam hosted by one of my favorite YouTubers. This is also my first jam submission ever, so I'm excited to see what you gamers think!
I spent the first day brain storming for ideas and eventually came across a Katamari video. I've never played Katamari, but I thought a game like that would fit perfectly for a theme centered around chaos! I found out pretty early on in development that the absorption mechanic was simple enough to get working in one line of code. Just parent the object you collide with to your character object, and it's easy sailing from there. 
Personally, the hardest part of development for this game was level design. I think I spent about half of the jam just working on the layout of the map. I also struggled a bit developing a solution that would automatically detect if an object was smaller than you. Running out of time, I finally settled on a hidden tier system that would allow you to absorb objects in the same tier as you. 
The tier system works behind the scenes. For example, you start off in the Small tier where you can collect smaller plants and rocks. After enough points, you "level up" to the Medium tier where you can grab more objects like benches. As you play, you'll find that it's not the most perfect system (some objects that look smaller than you may not stick to you), but it was the best I could do with what little time I had.
I hope you enjoy the game and be sure to share your highest score!
CONTROLS:WASD - MoveShift - SprintSpace - JumpMouse - Camera

game.title: Chaos Control

details.title: Chaos Control
details.description:
Warning ! There is no Quit button in the Windows Version, if you want to play it, I hope you know how to alt + f4 :P
Don't forget ! You can play the game in fullscreen if you click on the logo at the bottom right of the game

When you set together simple structures, can emerge chaotic structures. Inspired by the game of life and the butterfly effect. Made in 120h (I didn't know that there were a jam) for the Brackeys Game Jam 2021.2.

You are a mysterious evil guy who wants to eradicate humanity.
Send Chaos Cubes to Earth, but be careful, if you make one mistake, it can easily disorganized everything and make the level chaotic.
Use the rewinding time to set up a safe path for each cube and be prepared for chaos that will occur.





This game has 3 phases:
Set the path of a cube Like a rhythm game, press in time when a cube reaches a door. That will create lasers. Avoid each lasers that can destroy the Core Chaos Cubes



After that, you come back to phase 1 with one more cube
If you survive with 8 cubes sent, you win.

Chaos Dungeon is an exciting dungeon crawler game, but without the procedural genearation and with a whole lot of chaos. Choose between two boss fights to get through to the portal! details.title: Boxes, Drones and Kaos!
details.description:
You work at Box&Fuel, a packaging company with several warehouses that have to be perfectly organized.
One day, you are fired and replaced by drones (which do the job better and cheaper).
Filled with rage, you accidentaly summon Kaos, god of destruction. He offers you a deal: Let him inside your body and he'll give you the powers to get your revenge!
Your goal in this fast-paced game is to get as many boxes out of their place as you can! Although you begin only being able to take them with your hands, the more you move them, the quicker you'll level up and obtain new abilities.
There are over 13 unique abilities! Dashing, Fireballs, Grenades, Freezing, Tornadoes, Explosive Ducks, even Black Holes and many more!! 
Try to destroy as much as you can in 3 warehouses (each bigger than the last!) while drones try to put every box back in its place.
 Discover the secrets of the company you've worked for with 2 cinematics and many voicelines from Kaos, talking from within you...
Get your revenge fighting against the Final Boss and unlock God Mode, where you get no cooldowns and a whole city to destroy!! 
Don't hold anything back, level up by moving everything out of place, discover new and fun powers of destruction and most importantly...
LET THERE BE CHAOS  KAOS

game.short_text: Use your trusty senses to survive as long as you can in the galaxy's flimsiest ship!
game.title: This is Fine

details.title: This is Fine
details.description:
After a heated argument with your boss, probably involving pineapple and pizza, you are now the proud owner of the flimsiest ship in the galaxy, on your way to deliver your cargo of [REDACTED] to [REDACTED]. How long will it take? Who knows!
HOW TO PLAY
You must survive as long as you can with your ship, fixing up its constantly-breaking stations to keep both it and you voyaging through space! Make sense of the chaos around you through visuals and sound to prioritize the immediate dangers that arise. The different areas will have different cues pertaining to their current status, so pay careful attention as you learn to recognize them!
We apologize, as we ran out of time to make a tutorial or win screen, but you can brag about how many years you survived in the comments! If you want to have a straightforward explanation of the stations instead, read below.
PLAY GUIDE
- Radar: Controls whether the alarm sounds off when your ship is going to collide with something. You'll know this needs repair when you no longer hear the occasional regular pinging
- Pilot seat: You interact with this to extend how long before you collide with an asteroid. If you fail to do so, you will be hit at a faster rate, so this will be a top priority!
- Oxygen generator: Unsurprisingly, a lack of oxygen causes death. There's a subtle whirring sound in the background while this is working, and you can hear it slowly shut off when the power is depleted. Pay attention to the sound and your health!
- Medbay: The lights on the bed will indicate whether it has power or not, and after so many uses, it will break down.
- Elevator: Similar to the medbay, but you'll see sparks flying out when it's unusable
- Power generator: You'll notice that the lights are fading, and this is the time to start running to repair! Once this happens, the backup power will start depleting, and when fully drained, the ship will stop running. As soon as you start repairing it, backup power will begin to replenish, so don't worry if it gets a bit low, but ideally fix it up as much as you can.
- Vent: Despite those warm, glowing eyes, you'll want to be careful around the vent. When you hear the screech from across the ship, there'll be danger afoot! You'll want to repair the vent when the monster isn't present, or you might get a painful hug.
CONTROLS
WASD / Arrow Keys - MoveE - Repair/InteractEscape - Quit

game.short_text: Bereite Essen und Getränke in deinem intergalaktischen Schnellimbiss zu!
game.title: Space Drive In

details.title: Space Drive In
details.description:
SpielbeschreibungIn Space Drive In bist du dein eigener Chef und führst einen intergalaktischen Schnellimbiss. Deine Fritten und Shakes sind zwar simpel, aber die besten im Umkreis von Hunderten von Lichtjahren.  Die Ideenfindung und Entwicklung zu Space Drive In fand während des Brackeys 2021.2 Game Jams im Sommer innerhalb von 7 Tagen statt. Das Thema war "Let there be chaos". Wir erreichten dabei Platz 32 von insgesamt 1759 eingereichten Spielen.Du bereitest also Essen und Getränke für deine Kundschaft aus dem ganzen Universum zu. Doch in letzter Zeit passieren immer wieder komische Dinge auf deinem alten Raumschiff. Aber dein Bordcomputer zeigt dir immer die aktuellen Aktionspanel rechts im Bild an. Diese zeigen dir, welche schlimmen Dinge dich erwarten. Nur ein falscher Schritt auf deinem alten Schiff und das Licht geht aus, oder die hungrigen Nager essen dir alles weg, was nicht in einer Maschine steckt. Glücklicherweise zeigen dir die Panels an, in welche Richtung du dich nicht bewegen solltest. Bewegst du dich dennoch in die Richtung triggerst du die angezeigte Aktion und das Zubereiten der Gerichte wird schwieriger. Pass also auf, dass du nicht im Chaos versinkst!Hinweis: Das Spiel befindet sich in einem unvollständigen und prototypischen Zustand. Es kann dadurch zu Fehlern und Bugs kommen.SteuerungSpace Drive In kannst du bequem über deinen Browser direkt hier auf itch spielen. Die Steuerung ist dabei ziemlich simpel. Deinen Charakter bewegst du mit WASD, den Pfeiltasten oder deinem Controller. Wir empfehlen allerdings die Nutzung von Maus und Tastatur. Zum Interagieren mit den Maschinen, Lebensmitteln und Kunden drückst du den Interaktionsbutton(E).  
Es gibt vier verschiedene Gerichte im Spiel, welche du mit verschiedenen Maschinen kochen kannst. Hier sind einige Tipps für dich:
Der Freezer kann immer von zwei Seiten aus genutzt werden. Die eine gibt dir Eis, die andere gefrorene Pommes. Aber pass auf! Ein Aktionspanel kann die Seiten des Freezers tauschen,Um Saucen auf deine zubereiteten Pommes aufzutragen musst du mit diesen in der Hand über die entsprechende Seite des Saucenspenders laufen (rot Ketchup/ weiß Mayonnaise).In den Ecken befinden sich Teleporter, die dich schneller ans Ziel bringen können. Aber sei gewarnt! Ein Aktionspanel kann die Teleporter deaktivieren.Für die Herstellung von Pommes musst du gefrorene Pommes aus dem Freezer in die Fritteuse legen und warten. Aber warte nicht zu lang, sonst verbrennen sie dir.Um einen Milkshake herzustellen füllst du Eis aus dem Freezer und Schoko-Milch aus dem Kühlschrank in den Mixer.Denke daran, dass du die Aktionspanel auslöst, indem du in die auf dem Panel angezeigte Richtung läufst. Diese haben meistens einen negativen Effekt.
Credits
An der Entwicklung von Space Drive In waren folgende Entwickler beteiligt:
Richard Schubert (Code)Erik Maria Hasenknopf (Code)Max Putz (Art)Rawalue (Music)Mimas (Game Design)Samu Goetz (Sound)Jan Paschke
